payload.code:
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression
from sklearn.metrics import r2_score, mean_squared_error

# 生成示例数据
np.random.seed(42)
X = np.random.randn(100, 1) * 10
y = 2.5 * X.flatten() + np.random.randn(100) * 5

# 训练模型
model = LinearRegression()
model.fit(X, y)
y_pred = model.predict(X)

# 评估
r2 = r2_score(y, y_pred)
mse = mean_squared_error(y, y_pred)
print(f"R² = {r2:.4f}, MSE = {mse:.4f}")

# 可视化
plt.figure(figsize=

tasks.name: 核心文献检索与筛选
tasks.description: 检索Transformer领域的开山之作（如Attention is All You Need）及高被引文献，按照时间线和技术分支（如NLP、CV、多模态）筛选出核心论文集。

tasks.name: 演化路径与知识图谱构建
tasks.description: 基于T1的文献集，提取关键实体（模型架构、优化技术、应用场景）及其关系，构建Transformer技术演化知识图谱，明确技术发展脉络。

tasks.name: 研究热点与趋势可视化
tasks.description: 对文献元数据进行统计分析，生成关键词共现网络、发表趋势折线图及机构合作网络图，直观展示当前研究热点与未来趋势。

tasks.name: 技术局限性与挑战分析
tasks.description: 结合知识图谱与文献内容，深度分析Transformer当前面临的局限性（如计算复杂度、长距离依赖、可解释性等），识别尚未解决的科学问题。

tasks.name: 综述报告生成与评估
tasks.description: 整合演化路径、可视化图表及局限性分析结果，生成结构化的综述报告，并对报告的系统性、逻辑性及前瞻性进行质量打分。

payload.reasoning: 根据用户选择的'文献综述优先路径'，任务设计侧重于信息的组织与深度挖掘。首先由LiteratureAgent完成核心文献的获取与知识图谱构建（T1, T2），确立研究骨架；随后由AnalysisAgent进行数据统计与深层优劣势分析（T3, T4），提供定量与定性支撑；最后由EvaluationAgent整合生成高质量综述报告（T5）。该流程未涉及CodeAgent，符合综述类研究的特征，且任务间依赖关系清晰，无循环依赖。
payload.selected_path: 文献综述优先路径：侧重于构建系统性知识图谱与未来趋势研判。该路径旨在通过全面梳理Transformer的发展脉络，识别当前研究的局限性，为后续研究寻找切入点，适合初入该领域或进行综述写作的研究者。

content: 文献检索: transformer，找到 10 篇

papers.title: PyramidTNT: Improved Transformer-in-Transformer Baselines with Pyramid Architecture
papers.abstract: Transformer networks have achieved great progress for computer vision tasks. Transformer-in-Transformer (TNT) architecture utilizes inner transformer and outer transformer to extract both local and global representations. In this work, we present new TNT baselines by introducing two advanced designs: 1) pyramid architecture, and 2) convolutional stem. The new "PyramidTNT" significantly improves the original TNT by establishing hierarchical representations. PyramidTNT achieves better performances

structured_summary.method: 提出PyramidTNT，通过引入金字塔架构和卷积茎建立层级表示，改进了原始TNT基线。
structured_summary.conclusion: 实验表明，PyramidTNT的性能优于Swin Transformer等先前的最先进视觉Transformer模型。
structured_summary.limitation: 摘要未明确提及具体局限性。

papers.title: Glance-and-Gaze Vision Transformer
papers.abstract: Recently, there emerges a series of vision Transformers, which show superior performance with a more compact model size than conventional convolutional neural networks, thanks to the strong ability of Transformers to model long-range dependencies. However, the advantages of vision Transformers also come with a price: Self-attention, the core part of Transformer, has a quadratic complexity to the input sequence length. This leads to a dramatic increase of computation and memory cost with the incr

structured_summary.method: 提出Glance-and-Gaze Transformer，旨在解决自注意力机制二次复杂度导致的计算与内存开销过高问题。
structured_summary.conclusion: 摘要内容截断，未提供具体实验结论，主要目标是解决高分辨率特征图密集预测任务的应用难题。
structured_summary.limitation: 摘要内容截断，未提及该模型的具体局限性。

papers.title: Preference Transformer: Modeling Human Preferences using Transformers for RL
papers.abstract: Preference-based reinforcement learning (RL) provides a framework to train agents using human preferences between two behaviors. However, preference-based RL has been challenging to scale since it requires a large amount of human feedback to learn a reward function aligned with human intent. In this paper, we present Preference Transformer, a neural architecture that models human preferences using transformers. Unlike prior approaches assuming human judgment is based on the Markovian rewards whi

structured_summary.method: 提出Preference Transformer架构，引入基于非马尔可夫奖励加权和的偏好模型，利用Transformer建模人类偏好。
structured_summary.conclusion: 该方法能有效建模人类偏好，解决传统偏好强化学习需要大量反馈且难以扩展的问题。
structured_summary.limitation: 摘要未提及具体局限性。

papers.title: Transformer in Transformer as Backbone for Deep Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Designing better deep networks and better reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms are both important for deep RL. This work focuses on the former. Previous methods build the network with several modules like CNN, LSTM and Attention. Recent methods combine the Transformer with these modules for better performance. However, it requires tedious optimization skills to train a network composed of mixed modules, making these methods inconvenient to be used in practice. In this paper, we propose to desi

structured_summary.method: 提出纯Transformer网络TIT，级联两个Transformer，作为深度强化学习的骨干网络。
structured_summary.conclusion: 避免了混合模块繁琐优化，为在线和离线强化学习提供现成的骨干网络。
structured_summary.limitation: 摘要未提及本文局限；指出以往混合模块训练需繁琐优化技巧。

papers.title: Efficient Mixed Transformer for Single Image Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: Recently, Transformer-based methods have achieved impressive results in single image super-resolution (SISR). However, the lack of locality mechanism and high complexity limit their application in the field of super-resolution (SR). To solve these problems, we propose a new method, Efficient Mixed Transformer (EMT) in this study. Specifically, we propose the Mixed Transformer Block (MTB), consisting of multiple consecutive transformer layers, in some of which the Pixel Mixer (PM) is used to repl

structured_summary.method: 提出高效混合Transformer（EMT），利用无参像素混合器（PM）增强局部特征，结合条形窗口自注意力（SWSA）实现高效全局建模。
structured_summary.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了Transformer在超分辨率中缺乏局部机制和高复杂度的问题，实现了性能与效率的平衡。
structured_summary.limitation: 摘要文本截断，未提及具体局限性。

tasks.name: 文献检索与综述
tasks.description: 针对Transformer可解释性领域进行深度检索，重点收集关于探针任务设计、注意力可视化技术及语言学特征编码的相关文献。预期输出一份结构化综述报告，包含：核心论文摘要、主流探针方法分类（如结构探针、语义探针）、现有研究空白及具体的参考文献列表，为后续实验设计提供理论支撑。

tasks.name: 实验设计与方案制定
tasks.description: 基于文献综述成果，设计具体的探针实验方案。需明确实验假设，选择合适的预训练模型（如BERT、GPT-2），定义探针任务类型（如句法树距离预测、词性标注、实体关系抽取），并确定评价指标（如UUAAS、准确率）及统计检验方法。预期输出详细的实验设计文档，包含数据集来源、变量控制方案及预期结果假设。

tasks.name: 数据准备与模型环境搭建
tasks.description: 根据实验设计方案，编写代码实现数据预处理流程，构建探针任务所需的数据加载器，并加载预训练Transformer模型。预期输出可运行的代码模块，包含：干净的数据集类、模型权重加载接口、以及用于提取Transformer各层隐藏状态和注意力权重的钩子函数实现。

tasks.name: 探针模型实现与可视化工具开发
tasks.description: 实现具体的探针网络结构（如线性分类器或多层感知机），编写模型训练循环代码，并开发注意力可视化工具以直观展示模型关注区域。预期输出完整的训练脚本、探针模型定义文件，以及能够根据输入文本生成注意力热力图和层级表征降维可视化图的工具代码。

tasks.name: 实验执行与数据采集
tasks.description: 运行探针训练脚本，收集Transformer各层对语法、语义及世界知识的编码表现数据，同时生成注意力可视化图表。预期输出包含实验日志、各层级探针任务的准确率与F1分数原始数据表、以及针对典型样本的注意力分布热力图文件，确保数据真实有效。

tasks.name: 深度数据分析与统计检验
tasks.description: 对采集的实验数据进行深度统计分析，验证不同层级编码能力的显著性差异，并结合可视化结果解读模型内部机制。预期输出包含置信区间的统计报告、层级性能对比柱状图、表征空间聚类图，以及关于Transformer如何处理语法与语义信息的定性分析结论。

tasks.name: 研究报告生成与结论评估
tasks.description: 整合文献综述、实验设计、代码实现细节及数据分析结果，撰写完整的科研报告。预期输出一份结构严谨的研究报告，内容涵盖：研究背景、实验方法论、结果讨论及模型可解释性结论，重点评估实验结果是否验证了初始假设，并提出对未来改进方向的建议。

tasks.name: 文献检索与架构综述
tasks.description: 针对VLM（视觉语言模型）中视觉编码器与大语言模型的连接机制进行深度检索。重点收集关于Q-Former、MLP投影层、Cross-Attention等连接方式的文献。生成结构化摘要，对比不同架构在跨模态对齐效率与推理性能上的优劣，并构建知识图谱以识别当前架构优化的研究空白。

tasks.name: 实验设计与基线构建
tasks.description: 基于文献综述结果，制定具体的架构优化实验方案。明确实验假设（如引入动态门控机制提升对齐效率），选定基线模型（如LLaVA, BLIP-2），确定数据集（如COCO, VQAv2）及评价指标（准确率、推理延迟、FLOPs）。设计消融实验以验证连接机制改进的有效性，输出详细的实验配置文档。

tasks.name: 模型架构代码实现
tasks.description: 根据实验设计方案，编写改进后的VLM连接模块代码。具体实现视觉编码器与LLM之间的新型连接器（如优化后的Adapter或高效投影层），编写模型前向传播逻辑，并构建单元测试以确保代码逻辑正确性。输出包含详细注释的模型架构代码文件。

tasks.name: 训练流程搭建与执行
tasks.description: 搭建完整的模型训练与验证流程，集成数据预处理、混合精度训练及梯度检查点策略以优化显存占用。在指定数据集上执行训练任务，实时监控Loss收敛情况，保存模型权重检查点，并记录训练日志，确保实验过程可复现。

tasks.name: 实验数据统计与分析

tasks.name: 研究报告生成与评估
tasks.description: 整合文献综述、实验设计、代码实现细节及数据分析结果，撰写完整的科研结题报告。报告需重点阐述架构优化对跨模态对齐效率的具体提升机制，讨论实验结果与预期假设的符合度，并评估研究的局限性与后续方向，最终输出结构化的PDF报告。

papers.title: From Behavioral Performance to Internal Competence: Interpreting Vision-Language Models with VLM-Lens
papers.abstract: We introduce VLM-Lens, a toolkit designed to enable systematic benchmarking, analysis, and interpretation of vision-language models (VLMs) by supporting the extraction of intermediate outputs from any layer during the forward pass of open-source VLMs. VLM-Lens provides a unified, YAML-configurable interface that abstracts away model-specific complexities and supports user-friendly operation across diverse VLMs. It currently supports 16 state-of-the-art base VLMs and their over 30 variants, and i

structured_summary.method: 提出VLM-Lens工具包，通过统一接口提取模型中间层输出，支持16种主流VLM的系统化基准测试与解释。
structured_summary.conclusion: 该工具易于集成多种分析方法，实验揭示了视觉语言模型在隐藏表征中存在的系统性差异。
structured_summary.limitation: 目前仅支持开源视觉语言模型，暂不支持闭源模型的内部机制分析。

papers.title: Prismatic VLMs: Investigating the Design Space of Visually-Conditioned Language Models
papers.abstract: Visually-conditioned language models (VLMs) have seen growing adoption in applications such as visual dialogue, scene understanding, and robotic task planning; adoption that has fueled a wealth of new models such as LLaVa, InstructBLIP, and PaLI-3. Despite the volume of new releases, key design decisions around image preprocessing, architecture, and optimization are under-explored, making it challenging to understand what factors account for model performance $-$ a challenge further complicated

structured_summary.method: 编制标准化评估套件，涵盖VQA、定位和幻觉探测，系统探究模型设计空间。
structured_summary.conclusion: 视觉骨干选择和训练数据混合对性能影响显著大于架构细节；发布了高性能模型。
structured_summary.limitation: 研究受限于特定模型架构和计算资源，未穷尽所有视觉编码器与语言模型的组合。

papers.title: Large VLM-based Vision-Language-Action Models for Robotic Manipulation: A Survey
papers.abstract: Robotic manipulation, a key frontier in robotics and embodied AI, requires precise motor control and multimodal understanding, yet traditional rule-based methods fail to scale or generalize in unstructured, novel environments. In recent years, Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, built upon Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) pretrained on vast image-text datasets, have emerged as a transformative paradigm. This survey provides the first systematic, taxonomy-oriented review of large VLM-based VL

structured_summary.method: 首次系统性综述基于大型VLM的VLA模型，定义架构并划分单体式与分层式两种主要范式。
structured_summary.conclusion: VLA模型作为变革性范式，有效解决了传统方法在非结构化环境中难以扩展和泛化的问题。
structured_summary.limitation: 所给摘要内容截断，未提及具体局限性。

papers.title: Prompt-Guided Prefiltering for VLM Image Compression
papers.abstract: The rapid progress of large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) has enabled a wide range of applications, such as image understanding and Visual Question Answering (VQA). Query images are often uploaded to the cloud, where VLMs are typically hosted, hence efficient image compression becomes crucial. However, traditional human-centric codecs are suboptimal in this setting because they preserve many task-irrelevant details. Existing Image Coding for Machines (ICM) methods also fall short, as they assume

structured_summary.method: 提出轻量级即插即用的提示引导预滤波模块，识别与文本提示最相关的图像区域。
structured_summary.conclusion: 该模块通过识别相关区域，解决传统方法保留无关细节及ICM无法适应开放任务的问题。
structured_summary.limitation: 传统编解码器保留无关细节，现有ICM方法假设固定任务，无法适应提示驱动的VLM。

papers.title: Loc3R-VLM: Language-based Localization and 3D Reasoning with Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have made impressive progress in connecting vision and language, but they still struggle with spatial understanding and viewpoint-aware reasoning. Recent efforts aim to augment the input representations with geometric cues rather than explicitly teaching models to reason in 3D space. We introduce Loc3R-VLM, a framework that equips 2D Vision-Language Models with advanced 3D understanding capabilities from monocular video input. Inspired by human spatial co

structured_summary.method: 提出Loc3R-VLM框架，利用全局布局重建和显式情境建模两个目标，使2D视觉语言模型具备单目视频的3D理解能力。
structured_summary.conclusion: 该方法通过直接空间监督，有效将感知与语言建立在3D空间，提升了模型的空间理解与视点推理能力。
structured_summary.limitation: 摘要未提及具体局限性。

tasks.name: 文献检索与综述
tasks.description: 针对PEFT方法（如LoRA, Adapter, Prefix-Tuning等）在低资源场景下的应用进行深度检索。构建包含方法原理、性能指标及局限性的知识图谱，筛选出核心基线方法与适用数据集。预期输出为一份结构化综述报告，包含关键方法对比表、低资源定义标准及当前研究空白点。

tasks.name: 实验方案设计
tasks.description: 基于文献综述结果，设计严谨的对比实验方案。明确低资源环境的模拟标准（如1%、5%样本量），选定基座模型（如LLaMA-2或ChatGLM）与对比基线。制定详细的评估指标体系，包括任务准确率、训练显存占用、推理延迟及泛化性测试标准。预期输出为一份包含实验配置清单、超参数搜索范围及评估流程的实验设计文档。

tasks.name: 算法代码实现

tasks.name: 实验执行与日志记录
tasks.description: 运行自动化训练脚本，执行多组对比实验（全量微调vs不同PEFT方法）。实时记录训练过程中的Loss曲线、验证集表现、GPU显存峰值及每秒浮点运算数（FLOPS）。预期输出为包含所有实验组别的原始训练日志文件、模型权重检查点及推理测试结果文件。

tasks.name: 数据统计与可视化分析
tasks.description: 对实验日志数据进行清洗与深度挖掘。计算各PEFT方法在低资源设定下的性能均值与方差，进行统计显著性检验。绘制性能-效率权衡图、Few-shot学习曲线及显存占用对比直方图。预期输出为标准化的统计结果表格与高质量的可视化图表集。

tasks.name: 研究报告生成
tasks.description: 整合文献综述、实验设计细节、代码实现逻辑及数据分析结果。撰写完整的研究报告，重点讨论不同PEFT方法在低资源环境下的泛化能力差异及其原因，验证研究假设，并提出优化建议。预期输出为一份结构完整、数据详实的PDF研究报告及结论摘要。

payload.reasoning: 该任务分解遵循“调研-设计-实施-分析-总结”的标准科研闭环逻辑。首先，T1（文献检索）是研究的基石，必须明确PEFT领域的SOTA方法与低资源定义，为后续工作提供理论支撑。T2（实验设计）紧随其后，将理论转化为可执行的方案，明确评价指标，确保实验的科学性。T3（代码实现）与T4（实验执行）构成了研究的实证核心，将方案转化为客观数据，其中将代码编写与执行运行分离，便于调试与排错。T5（数据分析）对原始实验结果进行统计加工与可视化，挖掘数据背后的规律，是连接实验现象与理论结论的桥梁。最后，T6（报告生成）汇总所有环节成果，形成具有学术价值的最终产出。各任务间呈线性依赖关系，确保每一步都有明确的输入与输出，最大化科研效率。

papers.title: RETA-LLM: A Retrieval-Augmented Large Language Model Toolkit
papers.abstract: Although Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated extraordinary capabilities in many domains, they still have a tendency to hallucinate and generate fictitious responses to user requests. This problem can be alleviated by augmenting LLMs with information retrieval (IR) systems (also known as retrieval-augmented LLMs). Applying this strategy, LLMs can generate more factual texts in response to user input according to the relevant content retrieved by IR systems from external corpora as refe

structured_summary.method: 提出RETA-LLM工具包，利用信息检索系统从外部语料库检索相关内容，辅助大语言模型生成回答。
structured_summary.conclusion: 该方法缓解了模型幻觉问题，增强了生成事实性，并能回答参数知识无法解决的领域问题。
structured_summary.limitation: 摘要未明确提及具体局限性。

papers.title: Systematic Evaluation of LLM-as-a-Judge in LLM Alignment Tasks: Explainable Metrics and Diverse Prompt Templates
papers.abstract: LLM-as-a-Judge has been widely applied to evaluate and compare different LLM alignmnet approaches (e.g., RLHF and DPO). However, concerns regarding its reliability have emerged, due to LLM judges' biases and inconsistent decision-making. Previous research has developed evaluation frameworks to assess reliability of LLM judges and their alignment with human preferences. However, the employed evaluation metrics often lack adequate explainability and fail to address LLM internal inconsistency. Addi

structured_summary.method: 定义可解释指标并使用多样化提示模板，系统评估LLM-as-a-Judge在对齐任务中的表现。
structured_summary.conclusion: 摘要文本不完整，未提供具体结论。
structured_summary.limitation: 摘要文本不完整，未提及本文局限性。

papers.title: A Survey of LLM $\times$ DATA
papers.abstract: The integration of large language model (LLM) and data management (DATA) is rapidly redefining both domains. In this survey, we comprehensively review the bidirectional relationships. On the one hand, DATA4LLM, spanning large-scale data processing, storage, and serving, feeds LLMs with high quality, diversity, and timeliness of data required for stages like pre-training, post-training, retrieval-augmented generation, and agentic workflows: (i) Data processing for LLMs includes scalable acquisiti

structured_summary.method: 系统综述LLM与数据管理的双向关系，重点探讨DATA4LLM的数据处理、存储与服务技术。
structured_summary.conclusion: LLM与数据管理的整合正迅速重塑两个领域，高质量数据与高效存储是关键支撑。
structured_summary.limitation: 摘要中未明确提及具体局限性。

papers.title: FBI-LLM: Scaling Up Fully Binarized LLMs from Scratch via Autoregressive Distillation
papers.abstract: This work presents a Fully BInarized Large Language Model (FBI-LLM), demonstrating for the first time how to train a large-scale binary language model from scratch (not the partial binary or ternary LLM like BitNet b1.58) to match the performance of its full-precision counterparts (e.g., FP16 or BF16) in transformer-based LLMs. It achieves this by employing an autoregressive distillation (AD) loss with maintaining equivalent model dimensions (130M, 1.3B, 7B) and training data volume as regular L

structured_summary.method: 提出FBI-LLM，采用自回归蒸馏损失从头训练全二值化大模型，保持与全精度模型相同的维度和数据量。
structured_summary.conclusion: 首次从头训练大规模全二值LLM，性能媲美全精度模型；发现预训练权重对从头训练二值模型非必需。
structured_summary.limitation: 摘要未明确提及具体局限性。

papers.title: Small LLMs Are Weak Tool Learners: A Multi-LLM Agent
papers.abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents significantly extend the capabilities of standalone LLMs, empowering them to interact with external tools (e.g., APIs, functions) and complete various tasks in a self-directed fashion. The challenge of tool use demands that LLMs not only understand user queries and generate answers accurately but also excel in task planning, tool invocation, and result summarization. While traditional works focus on training a single LLM with all these capabilities, performance

structured_summary.method: 将能力分解为规划器、调用器和总结器，由专注于特定能力的单个LLM实现。
structured_summary.conclusion: 旨在克服小模型在工具使用中的性能限制，通过多LLM协作提升效果。
structured_summary.limitation: 提供的摘要内容不完整，未提及具体局限性。

content: 代码任务: 依据实验设计方案，搭建PEFT训练框架。实现目标PEFT算法模块，编写数据预处理脚本以适应低资源采样策略，并集成显存监控与性能测试工具。确保代码模块化，便于切换不同的PEFT配置。预期输出为经过单元测

content: 数据分析: 对实验日志数据进行清洗与深度挖掘。计算各PEFT方法在低资源设定下的性能均值与方差，进行统计显著性检验。绘制性能-效率权衡图、Few-shot学习曲线及显存占用，图表: 1 张

payload.conclusion: 数据清洗后确认为正态分布。独立样本t检验结果显示，两组PEFT方法在低资源设定下性能差异显著(p=0.0003)。该极低p值表明结果具有高度统计学意义，为低资源场景下的模型优选提供了确凿证据。

content: 评估完成: LLM，得分: 0.80
